steps.label: F1. No runtime errors on page
steps.eval: (() => { const t = document.body.innerText; if (/TypeError|undefined is not an object|Cannot read properties/.test(t)) throw new Error('RUNTIME_ERROR_VISIBLE: ' + t.slice(0, 300)); return 'clean'; })()

steps.label: F2. Textarea present + enabled
steps.eval: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder="Message the agent\u2026"]'); if (!el) throw new Error('textarea missing'); return { disabled: el.disabled }; })()

steps.label: F5a. Click Trusted tools
steps.eval: (() => { const btn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => b.textContent?.trim() === 'Trusted tools'); if (!btn) throw new Error('Trusted tools btn missing'); btn.click(); return 'clicked'; })()

steps.label: F5b. Trusted drawer visible
steps.eval: (() => { if (!document.querySelector('[role="dialog"][aria-label="Trusted tools"]')) throw new Error('trusted drawer not open'); return 'ok'; })()

steps.label: F5c. Close via X
steps.eval: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Close trusted tools drawer"]'); if (!btn) throw new Error('X button missing'); btn.click(); return 'closed'; })()

steps.label: F5d. Trusted drawer gone
steps.eval: (() => { if (document.querySelector('[role="dialog"][aria-label="Trusted tools"]')) throw new Error('trusted drawer still open'); return 'ok'; })()

steps.label: F6a. Click Resume transcript
steps.eval: (() => { const btn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => b.textContent?.trim() === 'Resume transcript'); if (!btn) throw new Error('missing'); btn.click(); return 'clicked'; })()

steps.label: F6b. Picker visible
steps.eval: (() => { const t = document.body.innerText; if (!/Transcript|Dismiss|No transcripts/i.test(t)) throw new Error('transcript picker not visible'); return 'ok'; })()

steps.label: F6c. Dismiss
steps.eval: (() => { const dismiss = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => /dismiss/i.test(b.textContent||'')); if (dismiss) dismiss.click(); return 'done'; })()

steps.label: F8a. Click worktree switcher
steps.eval: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Worktree switcher"]'); if (!btn) throw new Error('missing'); btn.click(); return 'clicked'; })()

steps.label: F8b. Listbox rendered
steps.eval: (() => { const lb = document.querySelectorAll('[role="listbox"], [role="menu"]'); return { count: lb.length }; })()

steps.label: F8c. Click outside
steps.eval: (() => { document.body.click(); return true; })()

steps.label: F10. Slash picker
steps.eval: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder="Message the agent\u2026"]'); el.focus(); const s = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value').set; s.call(el, '/'); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

steps.label: F10b. Slash listbox rendered
steps.eval: (() => { const lb = document.querySelectorAll('[role="listbox"]'); if (lb.length === 0) throw new Error('no slash listbox'); return { count: lb.length }; })()

steps.label: F10c. Clear
steps.eval: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder="Message the agent\u2026"]'); const s = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value').set; s.call(el, ''); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

steps.label: F11. Mention @foo
steps.eval: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder="Message the agent\u2026"]'); el.focus(); const s = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value').set; s.call(el, '@foo'); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

steps.label: F11b. Mention picker rendered
steps.eval: (() => { const lb = document.querySelectorAll('[role="listbox"]'); return { count: lb.length }; })()

steps.label: F11c. Clear
steps.eval: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder="Message the agent\u2026"]'); const s = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value').set; s.call(el, ''); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

steps.label: F12. Cmd+Enter fires <=1 time
steps.eval: (() => new Promise((res, rej) => { window.__sendCount = 0; const ws = WebSocket.prototype.send; WebSocket.prototype.send = function(data) { try { const s = typeof data === 'string' ? data : ''; if (/user_prompt|send_prompt|"prompt"|"type"\s*:\s*"send/.test(s)) window.__sendCount++; } catch(e){} return ws.apply(this, arguments); }; const el = document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder="Message the agent\u2026"]'); el.focus(); const setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value').set; setter.call(el, 'hello'); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); setTimeout(() => { el.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', code: 'Enter', metaKey: true, bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); setTimeout(() => { if (window.__sendCount > 1) rej(new Error('send fired ' + window.__sendCount + ' times')); else res({ sendCount: window.__sendCount }); }, 900); }, 100); }))()

steps.label: Final runtime error check
steps.eval: (() => { const t = document.body.innerText; if (/TypeError|Cannot read properties|undefined is not/.test(t)) throw new Error('LATE_ERR: ' + t.slice(0, 400)); return 'clean'; })()
